creator: ino-qc@spotteswoode.de.eu.org
text:
> Erik Greenwald:

> Actually, 'install' in the dist's doc/ should be ignored. That's
> handled in the port Makefile's post-install area, so it can respect
> the NOPORTDOCS flag. Here is a patch that installs the missing info
> files.

a good solution.

> As far as html docs, I'm not sure I want to induce the dependancy. I
> may include it as a config option in the next release, though?

that would be nice!

> Thanks much!

thank _you_, erik!


regards, clemens
